About NeuroPlay

Your free online brain training platform

Our Mission

At NeuroPlay, we believe that everyone should have access to tools that help them understand and improve their cognitive abilities. Our mission is to provide free, scientifically-inspired brain training games that are accessible to anyone with an internet connection.

We offer a variety of cognitive tests and games that measure different aspects of brain function, including processing speed, memory, attention, and problem-solving skills. Each game is designed to be engaging while providing meaningful feedback about your performance.

How It Works

1

Choose a Game

Browse our collection of brain training games and pick one that interests you.

2

Play & Test

Each game measures a specific cognitive ability. Follow the instructions and give it your best effort.

3

Track Progress

Your scores are saved automatically. Monitor your improvement over time and challenge yourself.

Privacy & Data

We take your privacy seriously. All game scores are stored locally on your device using your browser's localStorage. We do not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to our servers. You can clear your data at any time by clearing your browser's local storage.

For more details, please read our Privacy Policy.

Contact

Have questions, suggestions, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you! Please reach out to us at miraclehuang611@gmail.com.

🧠NeuroPlay

Train Your Brain, Unleash Your Potential

Free online brain training games to test and improve your cognitive abilities. Measure your typing speed, reaction time, memory, and more.

Popular Games

  • Typing Test
  • Reaction Test
  • Memory Test
  • Number Memory
  • Color Test
